new_year.name: This New Year
new_year.quote: Wishing you a year filled with clarity, growth, and powerful new beginnings.

republic_day.name: This Republic Day
republic_day.quote: Wishing you pride, unity, and strength as we celebrate our Constitution and nation.

vasant_panchami.name: This Vasant Panchami (Saraswati Puja)
vasant_panchami.quote: Wishing you wisdom, creativity, and knowledge under the blessings of Maa Saraswati.

maha_shivratri.name: This Maha Shivratri
maha_shivratri.quote: Wishing you strength, peace, and transformation guided by Lord Shiva.

holi.name: This Holi
holi.quote: Wishing you vibrant success, meaningful relationships, and colors of positivity.

ram_navami.name: This Shri Ram Navami
ram_navami.quote: Wishing you courage, discipline, and righteousness inspired by Lord Ram.

rath_yatra.name: This Shri Jagannath Rath Yatra
rath_yatra.quote: Wishing you divine direction, purposeful movement, and blessings from Lord Jagannath.

independence_day.name: This Independence Day
independence_day.quote: Wishing you freedom in thought, strength in action, and pride in our nation.

raksha_bandhan.name: This Raksha Bandhan
raksha_bandhan.quote: Wishing you enduring bonds of trust, protection, and lifelong connection.

janmashtami.name: This Janmashtami
janmashtami.quote: Wishing you wisdom, harmony, and divine joy inspired by Lord Krishna.

ganesh_chaturthi.name: This Ganesh Chaturthi
ganesh_chaturthi.quote: Wishing you success, clarity, and removal of obstacles through Lord Ganesha’s blessings.

vishwakarma_puja.name: This Vishwakarma Puja
vishwakarma_puja.quote: Wishing you innovation, precision, and excellence in every creation you build.

dussehra.name: This Dussehra
dussehra.quote: Wishing you victory over challenges and strength to uphold what is right.

diwali.name: This Diwali
diwali.quote: Wishing you prosperity, clarity, and illumination in every aspect of life.

chhath_puja.name: This Chhath Puja
chhath_puja.quote: Wishing you health, discipline, and divine blessings from Surya Dev.
